about.title: About Me
about.content: I am a developer with over 8 years of experience. I was born in Eger and currently live there. Throughout my career, I have proven myself at large companies such as Siemens, Deutsche Telekom, and Accenture. My goal is to deliver innovative solutions, whether it's about industrial automation or modern cloud-based systems.

contacts.title: Get in Touch!
contacts.subtitle: Whether it's about a professional project, education, or just a cup of coffee in Eger.
contacts.description: I was born in Eger and currently live there. I work as a Senior Developer from here.

project.title: Personal Portfolio and Professional Introduction Page
project.subtitle: About the Development
project.description: This project is a modern technological demo. My goal was to create a responsive, type-safe application that follows the latest development practices.
project.subdescription: It includes an automated CI/CD process (GitHub Actions), Prettier formatting, and Git-based version control.
